name: pinescript-vsc-server-rust
description: Pine Script v6 language server powered by Rust.

pineV6Lsp.serverPath.description: Path to the pinescript-vsc-server-rust server binary. Leave empty to use the bundled binary (falls back to target/debug).

pineV6Lsp.analysis.enableShadowingWarnin.description: Warn when local symbols shadow outer scope definitions.

pineV6Lsp.analysis.enableInputRangeValid.description: Validate input.int/float minval/maxval and defval ranges.

pineV6Lsp.analysis.enableTableBoundsChec.description: Warn on table cell operations that are out of bounds.

pineV6Lsp.analysis.enableMapChecks.description: Warn on map operations with missing keys or mismatched types.

pineV6Lsp.analysis.enableDrawObjectLifec.description: Warn when using deleted drawing objects.

pineV6Lsp.analysis.enableStrategyDirecti.description: Warn when strategy entries mix long and short without pyramiding.

pineV6Lsp.analysis.enableConstantConditi.description: Warn on constant if/while conditions that are always true or false.

pineV6Lsp.analysis.enableTaParamRelation.description: Warn on inconsistent TA parameter relationships.

pineV6Lsp.analysis.enableStrategyLimitSt.description: Warn on conflicting strategy entry limit/stop prices.

pineV6Lsp.analysis.enableStrategyOcaConf.description: Warn on OCA group type conflicts.

pineV6Lsp.analysis.enableStrategyExitPro.description: Warn on invalid strategy.exit profit/loss values.

pineV6Lsp.analysis.enableStrategyTrailin.description: Warn on invalid strategy.exit trailing parameters.

pineV6Lsp.analysis.enablePlotStyleConsis.description: Warn when plot() styles are mixed in a single script.

pineV6Lsp.analysis.enableDrawObjectIdReu.description: Warn on reusing draw object IDs for new objects.

pineV6Lsp.analysis.enableRequestSecurity.description: Validate request.security symbol and timeframe formats.
Warn when request.security expression arguments are missing or invalid.

pineV6Lsp.analysis.enableColorValueValid.description: Warn on invalid color.rgb or color.new parameters.

pineV6Lsp.analysis.enableArrayEmptyCheck.description: Warn on array operations that may run on empty arrays.

pineV6Lsp.analysis.enableArrayTypeChecks.description: Warn when array or matrix operations use mismatched value types.

pineV6Lsp.analysis.enableStringNaChecks.description: Warn when string functions receive na values.

pineV6Lsp.analysis.enableTaLengthConsist.description: Warn when TA function lengths vary widely in a script.

pineV6Lsp.analysis.enableStrategyCommiss.description: Warn on unusual commission or slippage values.

pineV6Lsp.analysis.enableStrategyPriceVa.description: Warn on non-positive strategy limit/stop prices.

pineV6Lsp.analysis.enableStrategyPositio.description: Warn when strategy sizing exceeds basic capital limits.

pineV6Lsp.analysis.enableStrategyAlertMe.description: Warn on empty or excessively long strategy alert messages.

pineV6Lsp.analysis.enableFunctionRecursi.description: Warn when functions are directly or indirectly recursive.

pineV6Lsp.analysis.arrayUnknownIndexWarn.description: Warn when array index is >= this threshold and size is unknown.

pineV6Lsp.analysis.loopLargeThreshold.description: Warn when loop bounds exceed this threshold.

pineV6Lsp.analysis.historyReferenceWarnT.description: Warn when history references exceed this threshold without max_bars_back.

pineV6Lsp.analysis.chartPointIndexWarnTh.description: Warn when chart.point.from_index uses an unusually large index.

pineV6Lsp.analysis.taLengthSpreadRatio.description: Warn when max TA length is >= ratio * min length.

pineV6Lsp.analysis.taLengthSpreadDelta.description: Warn when TA length spread exceeds this value.

pineV6Lsp.analysis.commissionWarnThresho.description: Warn when commission_value exceeds this value.

pineV6Lsp.analysis.slippageWarnThreshold.description: Warn when slippage exceeds this value.

pineV6Lsp.analysis.strategyPositionPerce.description: Warn when percent-based sizing exceeds this value.

pineV6Lsp.analysis.strategyAlertMessageM.description: Warn when alert_message exceeds this length.
